x-enumeration-literals.name: Maturity Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a financial instrument (e.g., loan, deposit) reaches its end and becomes payable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Initiated Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a process or transaction is started or requested.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Requested Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date specified by a party for execution or processing of an action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Executed Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a transaction is actually carried out or processed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Open Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when an account or contract is first established.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Close Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when an account or contract is officially terminated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expiry Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a contract, offer, or instrument ceases to be valid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Effective Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a change, condition, or transaction becomes legally or contractually valid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creating Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a record, transaction, or instruction is created in the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Activation Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a product, account, or arrangement becomes active and usable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deactivation Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a product or service is made inactive, but not necessarily closed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Blocking Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when funds, accounts, or services are restricted or blocked from use.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sending Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a payment, message, or instruction is dispatched.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valid From Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date from which a condition, rate, or rule starts to apply.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valid To Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date until which a condition, rate, or rule remains applicable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Receiving Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a payment, message, or instruction is received by a party or system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Signing Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when an agreement or contract is formally signed by involved parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Due Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date by which a payment or obligation must be fulfilled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Value Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when funds start or stop generating interest or become financially effective.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fulfillment Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when an obligation is fully completed or satisfied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Entry Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date when a transaction is recorded (booked) in the account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Last Calculation Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The last calculation date is the most recent date on which a calculation (interest, tax, fee, accrual, etc.) was executed successfully for a product or account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Next Calculation Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The next calculation date is the scheduled or expected date when the next calculation cycle will be executed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Last Accrual Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The last accrual date is the most recent date up to which amounts (interest, tax, fees) have been accumulated and recorded in the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Next Accrual Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The next accrual date is the scheduled date when the system will continue accumulating the next portion of interest, tax, or fees.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Last Updated Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The last updated date is the date and time when a record, attribute, or dataset was most recently modified in the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Next Updated Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The next updated date is the planned or scheduled date when the next update to a record or parameter is expected to occur.
